{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aethril spellcasting
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aethril spellcasting]] traditionally uses spell-circles of silver and starlight in a delicate web of light.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
